basic_details.job_title: NMRC Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: NMRC is engaging 01 Young Professional (Legal) on contract basis.

qualification.details: Preference: Candidates having experience in Government Sector.
qualification.education_qualification: Full-time Bachelor’s Degree in Law (3 years or 5 years integrated) from a recognized University/Institute

salary_details.details: Consolidated pay: Rs. 50,000/- per month. 5% annual increment on consolidated pay. Medical & Accidental Insurance coverage. Leave: 1.5 days per month + 2 Restricted Holidays.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on eligibility followed by Interaction / Interview by Selection Committee.
how_to_apply: Candidates should submit their applications as per the instructions given in the detailed advertisement. Applications must reach through the prescribed mode before the closing date. (Refer to the official notification for exact application submission details and email/ postal address).
important_instructions: Engagement is purely on contractual basis for a maximum period of 3 years. No claim for regularization/ absorption in NMRC. The Corporation reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment process at any stage. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate.

all_official_links.label: Download NMRC Young Professional Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NMRC Young Professional Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Noida Metro Rail Corporation Limited (a joint venture of Govt. of India and Govt. of Uttar Pradesh) has invited applications for the post of Young Professional (Legal). The notification includes complete details on qualifications, experience, age limit, remuneration, contract terms, and selection process. Candidates are strongly advised to read the full notification before applying. Download NMRC Young Professional Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NMRC Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: NMRC is engaging 01 Young Professional (Legal) on contract basis.

content_sections.heading: NMRC Young Professional - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Preference: Candidates having experience in Government Sector.

rows.details: Full-time Bachelor’s Degree in Law (3 years or 5 years integrated) from a recognized University/Institute
Minimum 4 years in handling legal cases, drafting contracts, statutory compliance, RTI, etc. (Self-practice as advocate not counted)
Maximum 35 years as on closing date

content_sections.heading: Remuneration & Other Benefits
content_sections.text: Consolidated pay: Rs. 50,000/- per month. 5% annual increment on consolidated pay. Medical & Accidental Insurance coverage. Leave: 1.5 days per month + 2 Restricted Holidays.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting based on eligibility followed by Interaction / Interview by Selection Committee.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Engagement is purely on contractual basis for a maximum period of 3 years. No claim for regularization/ absorption in NMRC. The Corporation reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment process at any stage. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate.

content_sections.heading: NMRC Young Professional Important Links
content_sections.text: Official Notification PDF: Click here Application Form: Click here Official Website: Click here Join Arattai Channel: Click Here Join Telegram Channel: Click Here Join WhatsApp Channel: Click Here Sarkari Result: Click Here Download Mobile App: Click Here

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in NMRC Young Professional (Legal) Recruitment 2026?
Q2. What is the salary for NMRC Young Professional (Legal)?
faq.answer: Consolidated remuneration of Rs. 50,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum experience required for NMRC Legal Young Professional?
faq.answer: 4 years post-qualification experience in relevant legal field.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for NMRC Young Professional Recruitment?
faq.answer: Maximum 35 years as on the closing date of advertisement.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required?
faq.answer: Full-time Bachelor’s Degree in Law (LLB – 3 years or 5 years integrated course).

faq.question: Q6. What is the tenure of engagement in NMRC?
faq.answer: Initially 1 year, extendable up to maximum 3 years.

faq.question: Q7. Is self-practice as an advocate counted as experience for NMRC YP (Legal)?
faq.answer: No, only experience with Govt./Govt. Sector/Law Firms/Private Companies is considered.

faq.question: Q8. Will NMRC provide medical insurance to Young Professionals?
faq.answer: Yes, Medical Health Insurance up to Rs. 3 Lakhs and Accidental/Natural Death coverage of Rs. 10 Lakhs.
